title: Velvety Rich Norwegian Collards Bake
description: A creamy, oven-baked collard greens dish with smoked salmon and a velvety cheese sauce, perfect for a cozy date night.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat and melt the butter. Add the diced onion and minced garlic; sauté until translucent, about 2‑3 minutes. Add the chopped collard greens and cook until just wilted, about 2 minutes. Transfer the greens to a greased 9×13‑inch baking dish.
Layer the sliced smoked salmon evenly over the collards.

In the same skillet, pour in the heavy cream and chicken broth, stirring to combine. Add lemon zest and chopped dill, and bring to a gentle simmer. Let the mixture thicken slightly, about 3 minutes, then pour it over the collards and salmon. Sprinkle the grated Gruyère cheese on top.
Bake uncovered for 20‑25 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with extra dill if desired.
Enjoy a comforting, velvety Norwegian collards bake that’s both tasty and visually appealing.
